recommendations.title: K-PAX
recommendations.overview: Prot is a patient at a mental hospital who claims to be from a far away planet. His psychiatrist tries to help him, only to begin to doubt his own explanations.

recommendations.title: Backbeat
recommendations.overview: Chronicles the early days of The Beatles in Hamburg, Germany. The film focuses primarily on the relationship between Stuart Sutcliffe, John Lennon, and Sutcliffe's girlfriend Astrid Kirchherr.

recommendations.title: The Shepherd
recommendations.overview: On Christmas Eve, a fighter pilot on his way home becomes lost while flying over water and needs a miracle to land safely.

recommendations.title: Curve
recommendations.overview: A soon-to-be bride on her way to a wedding rehearsal is having second thoughts and decides to take a detour. Her car breaks down and a hitch-hiker offers help. Could it be fate?

recommendations.title: Inkheart
recommendations.overview: The adventures of a father and his young daughter, in their search for a long lost book that will help reunite a missing, close relative.

recommendations.title: Hackers
recommendations.overview: Along with his new friends, a teenager who was arrested by the US Secret Service and banned from using a computer for writing a computer virus discovers a plot by a nefarious hacker, but they must use their computer skills to find the evidence while

recommendations.title: The Wings of the Dove
recommendations.overview: Kate is secretly betrothed to a struggling journalist, Merton Densher. But she knows her Aunt Maude will never approve of the match, since Kate's deceased mother has lost all her money in a marriage to a degenerate opium addict. When Kate meets a ter

recommendations.title: The Evil Next Door
recommendations.overview: A dad moves into a new house with his son and girlfriend. When he's out of town working, the son makes a new "friend" next doors.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: Night Shift
recommendations.overview: A young nurse with a domestic abuse past starts working the night shift at a small hospital, where, during the night, the ghost of a nurse materializes.
